title: Stir Fry Cucumber Salad
description: A refreshing cold salad made with stir fried cucumbers and a blend of Italian and Persian flavors.
instructions: Heat the stir fry oil in a pan over medium heat.
Stir fry the sliced cucumbers for 3-4 minutes until slightly softened.
In a separate bowl, mix together the Italian dressing, salt, and crushed Persian crispy bread.
Once the cucumbers are done, let them cool down to room temperature.
Add the cooled cucumbers to the bowl with the dressing mixture and mix well.
Garnish with chopped fresh parsley and serve chilled.
